TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pacidal ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 161 buwan, 398 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 72% kyan ku 285 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 28% kyan ku 113 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 52%, Sakizaya 1%, Bunun 5%, Tayan 1%, Truku 9%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pacidal hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pacidal hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pacidal hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pacidal hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pacidal hya' ga Paudadan. tay mkyahu' na Pacidal hya' ga Kaliyawan. tay 'zil na Pacidal hya' ga Pabuisan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ paʦ~ʨi*al ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βunun *%, tajan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa pau*a*an. taj mkjaħuʔ na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa kalijawan. taj ʔzil na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa paβuis~ɕan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pacidal ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 161 buwan, 398 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 72% kyan ku 285 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 28% kyan ku 113 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 52%, Sakizaya 1%, Bunun 5%, Tayan 1%, Truku 9%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pacidal hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pacidal hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pacidal hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pacidal hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pacidal hya' ga Paudadan. tay mkyahu' na Pacidal hya' ga Kaliyawan. tay 'zil na Pacidal hya' ga Pabuisan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ paʦ~ʨi*al ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βunun *%, tajan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa pau*a*an. taj mkjaħuʔ na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa kalijawan. taj ʔzil na paʦ~ʨi*al ħjaʔ ɣa paβuis~ɕan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
